Fedspeak vs. war deal: Here are the things that drove this week's stock market
Only a certain number of vessels per day are allowed to pass the Strait of Hormuz; this amount is to vary daily according to conditions - Iran's Fars News Agency, citing a military source
Putin: No ground for talks with Zelenskiy given Ukrainian strikes on civilian targets
Trump: Iran desperately needs food and medical supplies
Trump: The money the US Treasury is releasing goes into escrow, controlled by the US, and will be used to buy food and medical supplies from the US, including corn, wheat, and soybeans
Trump: This will ensure "nuclear honesty." If they did not agree to this, there would be no further negotiations
Trump: Iran has fully and completely agreed to the highest level of nuclear inspections long into the future
Oman and Iran: Will hold talks with coastal states in the region
Oman and Iran to work on the pact for Hormuz costs and services
Oman and Iran to work on an agreement on the management of navigation
Oman and Iran: Renewed the commitment to maintaining the Strait of Hormuz as a safe and open waterway for international navigation
